step_rationale: MI biomarker regulating SOD2; vascular performance and heart failure regulatory network.
mechanism: miR-21-5p is an acute MI biomarker that regulates antioxidant responses (SOD2) and vascular inflammation.

references.title: Integrative transcriptomic analysis identifies an oxidative stress-associated diagnostic signature for myocardial infarction.
Atherosclerotic Conditions Promote the Packaging of Functional MicroRNA-92a-3p Into Endothelial Microvesicles.
MicroRNAs regulating superoxide dismutase 2 are new circulating biomarkers of heart failure.
Atherosclerosis-related circulating miRNAs as novel and sensitive predictors for acute myocardial infarction.
